'''wajuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oestrogen|oestrogen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oestrogen|oestrogen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wajuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæjichith|wæjichith]] || [[word:wæjichij|wæjichij]] || [[word:wæjichish|wæjichish]] || [[word:wæjichi|wæjichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajujuchuth|wajujuchuth]] || [[word:wajujuchuj|wajujuchuj]] || [[word:wajujuchush|wajujuchush]] || [[word:wajujuchu|wajujuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajuchuth|wajuchuth]] || [[word:wajuchuj|wajuchuj]] || [[word:wajuchush|wajuchush]] || [[word:wajuchu|wajuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajufchufth|wajufchufth]] || [[word:wajufchufj|wajufchufj]] || [[word:wajufchufsh|wajufchufsh]] || [[word:wajufchuf|wajufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wajuchuthu|wajuchuthu]] || [[word:wajuchuju|wajuchuju]] || [[word:wajuchushu|wajuchushu]] || [[word:wajuchuku|wajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wajuchuth|wajuchuth]] || [[word:wajuchuj|wajuchuj]] || [[word:wajuchush|wajuchush]] || [[word:wajuchu|wajuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wajuchuthul|wajuchuthul]] || [[word:wajuchujul|wajuchujul]] || [[word:wajuchushul|wajuchushul]] || [[word:wajuchukul|wajuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wajuchuuthuthu|wajuchuuthuthu]] || [[word:wajuchuujuju|wajuchuujuju]] || [[word:wajuchuushushu|wajuchuushushu]] || [[word:wajuchuuku|wajuchuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wajuchuthun|wajuchuthun]] || [[word:wajuchujun|wajuchujun]] || [[word:wajuchushun|wajuchushun]] || [[word:wajuchukun|wajuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wajuchuthuoro|wajuchuthuoro]] || [[word:wajuchujuoro|wajuchujuoro]] || [[word:wajuchushuoro|wajuchushuoro]] || [[word:wajuchukuoro|wajuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
